name: cc-usage-guard
description: Pause-at-limit guard for Claude Code. A statusLine sensor records 5h + weekly rate-limit usage; PostToolUse/UserPromptSubmit hooks watch it in two tiers — a soft WARN nudge on approach, then a hard PARK that injects a STOP, schedules a one-shot CronCreate auto-resume at reset, and fires a PushNotification. Per-window thresholds; subagents and teammates (any nesting depth) wind down and return instead of parking; debounced per session and per spawned agent. Claude Code only (statusLine + hooks).
